== Notes for [[Item:Q99590|Q99590]] ==

[http://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90_%D7%91%D7%A8_%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90 על מר זוטרא השלישי בן מר זוטרא השני נאמר:]

In the ninth century, probably in Palestine, ''Seder ʿOlam Zuta'' (Smaller World Order, including an excerpt of ''Seder ʿOlam rabba'') listed the Palestinian leaders of the academy of Tiberias and traced the Palestinian branch of the family of ''Mar Zutra III'', the son of the Exilarch, the representative of the Babylonian Jews, who had become the head of the academy of Tiberias after 520 C.E. (neubauer, II, x, 68-87; lazarus).

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD72ABA81EFBBFA9822EF79916C8516
geni:6000000014896334965

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
